title: mirabilis gracilis
intro: Mirabilis gracilis, also known as the slender four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Mirabilis gracilis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis gracilis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
